summary:
## Company
**ALT Agency** (An Alternative Type of Agency) – a Birmingham-based web design agency.

## Value Proposition
“We create fully custom, fast, secure, and easy‑to‑manage websites, backed by a money‑back guarantee. No surprises, no guesswork – just a site that works exactly as imagined.”

## Key Services
- Custom web design & development (WordPress, ecommerce)
- Interactive prototyping & Figma feedback
- In‑house design, development, QA & optimisation
- Website redesigns and brand launches

## Main Target Audience
Businesses that are frustrated with slow sites, hard‑to‑use editors, unreliable developers, and designs that don’t convert – typically UK‑based SMEs seeking a reliable, transparent agency partner.
name: Jeremy Lewis
